content: We propose a framework for paper reading assistance. Our main contributions include citation-aware extraction and stable fallback retrieval.
The problem is academic paper understanding with reliable evidence grounding.
Our method pipeline has three stages: preprocess input, encoder module, and structured output generation.
We evaluate on dataset ToySet and compare against baseline methods with metric F1.
The framework outperforms baseline by +3.2 F1 on ToySet benchmark.
A limitation is dependence on high quality section metadata; future work includes larger datasets.
